CustomField.description: API name of the lookup or relationship field that connects this object to its predecessor. For child-to-parent relationships, this is the lookup field on the child object. For parent-to-child, this is the lookup field on the predecessor (child) object. Used to populate foreign key relationships during data import.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the API name of the lookup field that links this object to its predecessor (e.g., AccountId on Opportunity for an Account predecessor).
CustomField.label: Relationship Field
